risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Crisis
risk_summary: The project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. ARTF and GFF funds have been cancelled, and IDA grants remain suspended pending World Bank decision.
evidence_quote: The decision to cancel Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) and Global Financing Facility (GFF) funds in the project is based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until further decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating persistent fragility in the operating environment that constrains project implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_title: Service Provider Payment Delays Due to Institutional Breakdown
risk_summary: Significant delays in timely payments to BPHS/EPHS service providers (only 47% receiving timely and complete payments against 100% target), indicating governance and institutional capacity collapse affecting health service delivery.
evidence_quote: Percentage of BPHS/EPHS service providers receiving timely and complete payments as per contractual obligations: Actual 47.00%, End Target 100.00%. Comments: There was significant delays in timely payments to service providers.
